# Woordenlijst {#section-glossary}

+----------------------+-----------------------------------------------+
| Term                 | Definitie                                     |
+======================+===============================================+
| *\<Term-1\>*         | *\<definitie-1\>*                             |
+----------------------+-----------------------------------------------+
| *\<Term-2\>*         | *\<definitie-2\>*                             |
+----------------------+-----------------------------------------------+
